name: GDN-Hybrid: Gated DeltaNet + Sliding Window Attention
blurb: GDN-Hybrid replaces the transformer backbone with Gated DeltaNet (delta-rule linear recurrence) + Sliding Window Attention: [GDN×5] → [SWA] → [GDN×5] → [SWA_shared]. 33.86M params, 512-dim, SP1024 tokenizer, QK-Gain 5.0, full-Hessian int6 GPTQ + zstd-22. No TTT. 3-seed cold-cache mean: 1.0283 BPB (seeds 42/1337/2024, fresh pods, VAL_LOSS_EVERY=9999, step-1 at ~105s confirming cold Triton cache). Individual seeds: 1.027163 / 1.027614 / 1.030148. All artifacts 14.48–14.70 MB. 8×H100 SXM, 590s per seed.
author: Abhishek8108
